nasb.text: Then they turned and went up by the way of Bashan, and Og the king of Bashan went out with all his people, for battle at Edrei.

esv.text: Then they turned and went up by the way to Bashan. And Og the king of Bashan came out against them, he and all his people, to battle at Edrei.

cnv.text: 以色列人回頭，沿著到巴珊的路上走；巴珊王噩和他的眾民都出來迎著以色列人，在以得來與他們交戰。

ccb.text: 以色列人回师前往巴珊，巴珊王噩率全军出动，在以得来迎战以色列人。
